_meta.notes: v2: Added 'disaster' category to major languages (landslide, dam breach, flash flood terms). Added 'org_terms' category (agency/org names for metadata scoring, not is_relevant gate). Extended npi (Nepali) significantly. Extended bul, ukr, kat, fas, khm. Fixed garbled entries in kat and khm. Original flood/river terms preserved. v2.1: spa — added DANA/gota fría, fallecidos/desaparecidos/rescatados, barranco/torrente/rambla, Spain response orgs (UME, Guardia Civil), removed LatAm-only agency names from shared spa disaster list. | Enrichment patch applied: fixed lua (Tshiluba) bug (was Swahili), removed wol 'ndiaye' surname, added disaster/impact/org_terms to 30 languages, expanded Tier 3 sparse languages (lin, kon, lua, sag, men, tem, mnk, wol).
